leverage_risk: reduced; GGLL is the only remaining leveraged ETF risk valve
weak_position_drag: SOXL, UGL, INTC, SOXS, TSLQ, and GDXU are closed
legacy_position_risk: closed-position history retained for audit only
rule_compliance: Closed-position opportunity cost must be measured separately from rule-compliance score.
redeployment_readiness: No re-entry without a new approved rule.
key_findings: SOXL rebounded after closure, but rebound opportunity cost does not make the cleanup execution incorrect.
Execution correctness remains based on rule compliance, risk reduction, and account-structure improvement.
Closed instruments must not be rendered as buy candidates.
recommended_next_actions: Add an opportunity_cost_after_closure metric separate from execution correctness.
Require a new decision record before any re-entry.
